title: Tenant May Not Deny Landlord's Title at Commencement of Relation
text: A tenant is not permitted to deny the title of his landlord at the time of the commencement of the relation.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences

notes: Prevents a tenant from denying the landlord's title at the commencement of the landlord-tenant relationship.
